riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)

causalAutopsy.notes: PR #864 shipped the objective transcript auditor as a manual CLI with no structural invocation — the exact prose-wish pattern 'Observation Needs Structure' (#861) bans, recreated one level up. PR #856 gated only the subjective half (mentor seat-counts). This closes the gap: the dogfooded-channel cycle record now refuses to exist without the audit artifact, and local filing claims are verified against the real ledger. Also surfaced during build: #864's single base-url meant the canonical cross-agent flow (mentee holds the transcript, mentor owns the ledger) was structurally impossible — fixed with the read/write split.
